items.raw_desc: Szűrőtöltet SEDCO Filtrační kuličky FLOWCLEAR PES AQUA CRYSTAL 700 g:The Flowclear PES aqua crystal beads last for several season for their function just 50-100 g. The balls are made of polyester microfiber. These beads with a diameter of about 50-60 mm have a very high filtration capacity. The fibrous structure of the bead has the ability to trap dirt as small as 1.5 micrometers. In addition, the balls have the property that they can be used almost indefinitely. After the end of the season, just remove the balls from the filter, then wash them in the washing machine and they are ready to serve another season. A pack of 1 kg filter beads successfully replaces up to 35 kg of sand. Another advantage is that you can use the same filter cartridge as a replacement for relatively expensive and inefficient paper filter cartridges for use in pools with cartridge filtration, whirlpools, garden ponds, etc.                     Technical parameters of the SEDCO filter cartridge of Flowclear PES aqua crystal filter beadsAmount: 700gMaterial: 100% polyester microfiberColour: whiteAfter...
